description:
On the next This Is My Architecture, we walk through an on-time integrated data pipeline using serverless technologies with a feedback loop to improve product quality, part monitoring, and increase situational awareness for process engineers and data scientists.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: HP: Serverless Data Pipeline to Process Manufacturing Data From Assembly Lines in Near Real-Time
